title: Record soft56 reserved28k and 8-line command previews

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft56 Reserved28 CmdPreview8 Contract

## Soft 56
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.56 so full summaries start earlier under long sessions

## Reserved 28k
reserved context headroom defaults to 28k tokens for denser usable window before hard block

## Cmd preview 8
TUI command/write previews default to 8 lines for denser tool chrome without expand

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/tool-call vitest
